creator: vs@foldr.org
text:
ssh-keyscan is a tool to collect ssh-keys from remote hosts automatically.
The manpage however fails to mention that this tool is for v1 only.

Fix: 

Someone could fix ssh-keyscan. I don't know if the sshes from the
ports will do things better. I'd settle for simply mentioning this in the
man page.
How-To-Repeat: Try to collect a key from a host running only the v2 protocol -> timeout
